title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: This AI news roundup covers recent developments including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, and Gemini live translation. It also features discussions of new models like DiffusionGemma, video generation tools like VideoMDM and Millivid, and TTS systems like Dots. The video touches on the discontinuation of Claude Fable.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys recent model releases and tools across several categories. New language models include GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, and MiniMax M3, alongside DiffusionGemma and other Google models, with Gemini adding live translation. The video also covers video generation tools VideoMDM and Millivid, the Dots text-to-speech system, full body avatars, and the discontinuation of Claude Fable. Recurring technical threads include sparse attention and diffusion models.
